name: How do I know if my lawyer's AI use keeps my info confidential?
description: Ask about data visibility to AI providers.[3]

mainEntity.name: How do I know if my lawyer's AI use keeps my info confidential?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask about data visibility to AI providers.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Ask if data shared with AI is visible to providers or strangers—ethics demand secure handling.[3] Lawyers must assess confidentiality risks before AI input.[3] Key factors: No sharing sensitive client data; verify provider policies; retain interactions.[3] Request their AI ethics policy in writing. Choose lawyers with strong governance.[2]
